title: Cliffside Penthouse
description:
The summit of the resort

Perched at the highest point of the property, the Cliffside Penthouse commands a full 270-degree panorama of coastline. Two bedrooms, a private plunge pool, and a dining pavilion make it a natural choice for milestone celebrations.

  • Private 20-ft plunge pool and sun deck
  • Two king bedrooms plus sofa bed
  • Outdoor dining pavilion for 8
  • Dedicated butler on call 24/7
  • Complimentary airport transfer
